questions.subject: Current Affairs
questions.prompt: How many of the following pairs of reports and their publishing organizations are correctly matched?
contextLines: 1. Global Money Laundering Report : Financial Action Task Force (FATF)
3. Financial Sector Assessment Program Report : World Bank
4. World Social Protection Report : International Labour Organisation (ILO)
questions.explanation: All four pairs are correctly matched. The Global Money Laundering Report is by FATF. The World Intellectual Property Report (WIPR) is by WIPO. The Financial Sector Assessment Program (FSAP) is a joint program of the IMF and World Bank (the source lists World Bank). The World Social Protection Report is a flagship report of the ILO.
questions.takeaway: Familiarity with the specific flagship reports of major international organizations like the World Bank, ILO, and WEF is essential for UPSC Prelims.
questions.evidenceExcerpt: Global Money Laundering Report: FATF; World Intellectual Property Report (WIPR): WIPO; Financial Sector Assessment Program (FSAP) Report: World Bank; World Social Protection Report: ILO.

questions.subject: Current Affairs
questions.prompt: Which of the following pairs of reports and their publishing organizations are correctly matched?
contextLines: 1. World Social Protection Report : International Labour Organisation
2. Financial Sector Assessment Program (FSAP) Report : World Bank
3. Global Information Technology Report : World Economic Forum
4. World Intellectual Property Report : World Intellectual Property Organization
questions.explanation: All four pairs are correctly matched according to the source material. The World Social Protection Report is published by the ILO. The FSAP is a joint program but the source attributes it to the World Bank. The Global Information Technology Report is a WEF publication, and the World Intellectual Property Report is by WIPO.
questions.takeaway: UPSC often tests the ability to distinguish between reports published by the World Bank, ILO, and WEF as they cover overlapping socio-economic themes.
questions.evidenceExcerpt: World Social Protection Report - International Labour Organisation (ILO). Financial Sector Assessment Program (FSAP) Report - World Bank. Global Information Technology Report - WEF (World Economic Forum). World Intellectual Property Report (WIPR) - WIPO.
